source.sourcePath: raw/sources/RA/04_제품별 인허가 진행 문서/05_Blue (G1417MCW 외 7종)/▶ 시험소/06. Usability 보완_250103/05. 주요 부품 인증서 + 사양서/60-2230C/ASNZS_60-SIPT_60-2230C/ASNZS 4268 2017_2.4G BT LE_ST60-2230C_AR740701-11AE.pdf

sourceSummary.oneLine: AS/NZS 4268:2017 test report for Laird Connectivity ST60-2230C Bluetooth LE module variants.
sourceSummary.officialUse: Supports regulatory evidence that the tested sample was evaluated for compliance with AS/NZS 4268:2017 and referenced EN 300 328 V2.2.2 requirements.
keyPoints: Report No. AR740701-11AE, Rev. 01, initial issue Feb. 25, 2021.
Equipment is an 802.11 ac/a/b/g/n M.2 2230 + Bluetooth 4.2 module; representative model ST60-2230C was selected for final test.
The report declares the tested sample evaluated and in compliance with AS/NZS 4268:2017.

Summary of Test Results shows Pass for RF output power, power spectral density, emission bandwidth, operating frequencies, transmitter unwanted emissions, receiver spurious emissions, and receiver blocking.
Receiver blocking was tested as Receiver Category 2 with PER limit less than or equal to 10%.

entities.name: International Certification Corp.
entities.evidence: We, International Certification Corp., would like to declare that the tested sample has been evaluated and in compliance with the requirement of the above standards.

concepts.name: AS/NZS 4268 compliance testing
concepts.evidence: the tested sample has been evaluated and in compliance with the requirement of the above standards

concepts.name: Supplementary report
concepts.evidence: This report is issued as a supplementary report to original ICC report no. AR740701-03AE.

concepts.name: Representative model testing
concepts.evidence: The above models, model ST60-2230C was selected as a representative one for the final test and only its data was recorded in this report.

concepts.name: Power spectral density
concepts.evidence: Power Spectral Density Meet the requirement of limit. Pass

concepts.name: Receiver blocking
concepts.evidence: Receiver Blocking Meet the requirement of limit. Pass

concepts.name: Bluetooth Low Energy
concepts.evidence: Bluetooth LE (Low energy) uses GFSK modulation.

evidence.claim: The document is AS/NZS Test Report AR740701-11AE, Rev. 01.
evidence.evidenceText: Report No.: AR740701-11AE Page : 1 of 77 Report Version: Rev. 01 AS/NZS Test Report

evidence.claim: The report initial issue date is Feb. 25, 2021.
evidence.evidenceText: AR740701-11AE Rev. 01 Initial issue Feb. 25, 2021

evidence.claim: The tested equipment is an 802.11 ac/a/b/g/n M.2 2230 + Bluetooth 4.2 module.
evidence.evidenceText: Equipment : 802.11 ac/a/b/g/n M.2 2230 + Bluetooth 4.2 module

evidence.claim: The model number identified on the cover page is ST60-2230C.
evidence.evidenceText: Model No. : ST60-2230C

evidence.claim: The applicant is Laird Connectivity, Inc.
evidence.evidenceText: Applicant : Laird Connectivity, Inc.

evidence.claim: The report standard on the cover page is AS/NZS 4268:2017.
evidence.evidenceText: Standard : AS/NZS 4268:2017

evidence.claim: Testing applied standards include AS/NZS 4268:2017 and EN 300 328 V2.2.2 (2019-07).
evidence.evidenceText: According to the specifications of the manufacturer, the EUT must comply with the requirements of the following standards: AS/NZS 4268:2017 EN 300 328 V2.2.2 (2019-07)

evidence.claim: The report is a supplementary report to original ICC report AR740701-03AE.
evidence.evidenceText: This report is issued as a supplementary report to original ICC report no. AR740701-03AE.

evidence.claim: The listed changes were verified not to impact the original test results.
evidence.evidenceText: After verification, above changes does not impact to original test results. Thus test results remain the same.

evidence.claim: ST60-2230C was selected as the representative model for final test data.
evidence.evidenceText: The above models, model ST60-2230C was selected as a representative one for the final test and only its data was recorded in this report.

evidence.claim: Bluetooth LE operating frequency range is 2400-2483.5 MHz, with channels 2402-2480 MHz and 1 Mbps data rate.
Bluetooth LE uses GFSK modulation.
evidence.evidenceText: Bluetooth LE (Low energy) uses GFSK modulation.

evidence.claim: The summary reports RF Output Power measured result of 9.85 dBm with Pass result.
evidence.evidenceText: RF Output Power 9.85 dBm. Pass

evidence.claim: The maximum RF output power limit stated in the report is equal to or less than 20 dBm.
evidence.evidenceText: The maximum RF output power shall be equal to or less than 20 dBm

evidence.claim: Power Spectral Density met the limit and passed.
evidence.evidenceText: Power Spectral Density Meet the requirement of limit. Pass

evidence.claim: Emission bandwidth and operating frequencies met the limit and passed.
evidence.evidenceText: Emission Bandwidth Meet the requirement of limit. Pass 6.6 4.3.2.7 Operating Frequencies Meet the requirement of limit. Pass

evidence.claim: Transmitter unwanted emissions in out-of-band and spurious domains met the limit and passed.
evidence.evidenceText: Transmitter unwanted emissions in the out of band domain Meet the requirement of limit. Pass 6.4 4.3.2.9 Transmitter unwanted emissions in the spurious domain Meet the requirement of limit. Pass

evidence.claim: Receiver spurious emissions met the limit and passed.
evidence.evidenceText: Receiver spurious emissions Meet the requirement of limit. Pass

evidence.claim: Receiver blocking met the limit and passed.
evidence.evidenceText: Receiver Blocking Meet the requirement of limit. Pass

evidence.claim: Geo-location capability was not applicable because the device has no such capability.
evidence.evidenceText: Geo-location Capability The device has no this capability. N/A

evidence.claim: There was no deviation from the test standard and measurement procedure.
evidence.evidenceText: 1.6 Deviation from Test Standard and Measurement Procedure None

evidence.evidenceText: Test Laboratory International Certification Corp. Test Site TH01-WS

reviewFlags.reason: Authority or jurisdiction is ambiguous: source is titled AS/NZS Test Report, cites AS/NZS 4268:2017, and the summary table references ACMA 4268, but no explicit issuing regulatory authority is named.
Some measurement result pages contain headings, notes, or plot placeholders without extracted numeric tables, suggesting partial OCR or preprocessing loss for detailed emissions data.
